name: Nuvei Payment Technology API
what_it_does: Nuvei REST API for global payment technology and acquiring platform. Enables AI agents to manage payment acceptance across 200+ payment methods globally, handle card-present and card-not-present transactions, access alternative payment methods (APMs) including local payment options in 200+ countries, retrieve payout and money transfer management, handle cryptocurrency payment acceptance and settlement, manage subscription and recurring billing, access fraud and risk management data, retrieve settlement and reconciliation data, and integrate global payments with ecommerce, marketplace, and financial platforms.
use_cases: Processing global payments with local payment methods from ecommerce payment agents
Managing payouts and money transfers from marketplace payment automation agents
Handling cryptocurrency payment acceptance from digital commerce agents
Retrieving settlement and reconciliation data from financial automation agents
not_for: Domestic-only payments without global and alternative payment method needs
Simple card-only payments without APM and crypto complexity
Consumer banking without merchant payment processing focus
best_when: A global ecommerce company, marketplace, or fintech using Nuvei wants AI agents to automate multi-currency payment acceptance, local payment method routing, payout management, crypto settlements, and reconciliation.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment processing involves direct financial transactions. Cryptocurrency settlement introduces volatility risk. Automated payout and money transfer requires regulatory compliance. Multi-currency FX risk must be managed. PCI-DSS scope for cardholder data.

auth.notes: Nuvei uses API key and HMAC signature for authentication. Merchant-level credentials with transaction signing. Well-documented developer portal. SDKs for multiple languages. Webhooks for payment events. Sandbox environment available. PCI-compliant tokenization.

pricing.paid_tiers: Interchange-plus and flat-rate pricing; enterprise negotiated rates
pricing.notes: Montreal, Canada. NASDAQ: NVEI (taken private by Advent International 2024). Founded 2003. Global payment technology platform. $200B+ annual payment volume. 200+ payment methods in 200+ countries. Strong regulated markets (gaming, crypto, financial services). Competes with Adyen and Checkout.com for global payments. Particularly strong in gaming and crypto.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment transactions are real money movements — require approval workflows and reconciliation
Cryptocurrency settlement introduces FX and volatility risk — must be explicitly handled
No public MCP server — well-documented API key REST API with multi-language SDKs
No OAuth/scopes — HMAC signing means all API keys have full access; protect carefully
Gaming and regulated markets have specific compliance requirements — verify jurisdiction
Reconciliation automation must handle multi-currency settlements and FX conversions correctly
agent_readiness.security_notes: Payment and financial data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key + HMAC. Multi-region. Crypto settlement risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Payment data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, ISO27001. API key + HMAC. Multi-region. No scope granularity.
